prompt_text:
### Demographics: 67-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.7 kg; Height 152.5 cm; BMI 33.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.4%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 6.6%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 145mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 128mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.9kg; 9 months ago 77.3kg; 6 months ago 76.7kg; 3 months ago 72.7kg; current 76.7kg), Height (12 months ago 152.5cm; 9 months ago 152.5cm; 6 months ago 152.5cm; 3 months ago 152.5cm; current 152.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 12U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 317mg/g; 9 months ago 209mg/g; 6 months ago 260mg/g; 3 months ago 177mg/g; current 205mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 133mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
